title: Hotel Terraza del Pacífico | Playa Hermosa, Costa Rica
desc: Beachfront hotel in Playa Hermosa, Costa Rica. Ocean-view rooms, LED-lit pool, Mediterranean restaurant and unforgettable experiences.
outline: H2: A Pool Unlike Anything Else in Costa Rica

Hotel Terraza del Pacífico

Playa Hermosa

Oceanfront Luxury • Unforgettable Sunsets • Authentic Costa Rican Hospitality

Discover One of Costa Rica's Most Extraordinary Beachfront Escapes

Nestled directly on the shores of Playa Hermosa, Terraza del Pacífico offers an experience unlike anywhere else on Costa Rica's Pacific Coast—where the ocean is your front yard, sunsets become nightly events, and every stay creates memories that last a lifetime.

Book Your Escape
Explore the Resort
✓
Best rate guaranteed when booking direct
Welcome to Paradise

On Costa Rica's Pacific coast, between the constant sound of waves and the whisper of the mountains, there's a place where time stands still. With over 20 years of history and direct beach access, we are a sanctuary that celebrates the real beauty of Playa Hermosa.

A Pool Unlike Anything Else in Costa Rica

As the sun sets over the Pacific, our signature pool transforms into something extraordinary. 1,200 LED lights Designed by a renowned Italian artist, this one-of-a-kind masterpiece features more than 1,200 LED lights shimmering beneath the water, creating the illusion of a star-filled sky beneath your feet.

More than a pool, it's an immersive work of art—where luxury, innovation, and nature come together to create an unforgettable experience. Whether you're enjoying an evening swim, relaxing poolside with a cocktail, or simply taking in the atmosphere, you'll find yourself surrounded by a breathtaking display found nowhere else in Costa Rica. Experience the magic. Experience Terraza del Pacifico.

Vivace Beachfront

The gastronomic heart of the hotel, a beachfront space where tropical architecture, salty breeze, and culinary art come together in perfect harmony.

Under the direction of Chef Luigi from Sicily, Italy, enjoy a mixed Mediterranean and Italian culinary experience that celebrates authentic flavors with fresh ingredients.
